list.description: Wondering where all your money is going? Use the Finance Tracker to list out all your transactions! Easily view and edit your purchases.
list.title: Finance Tracker

list.description: Build your recipe collection using Larder to Table. Search for your favorite meals by title or ingredients! Never lose your dear old Granny's Famous Sugar Cookie recipe again!
list.title: Larder to Table

list.description: A classic card matching game to sharpen your memory with a few clicks!
list.title: Magic Card Game

list.description: Conveniently organize all of your projects using Piddle Together. Assign tasks to teammates. Your whole team can keep its work up to date and moving forward!
list.title: Piddle Together

list.description: This is my take on the classic Snake Game. No need for a bulgy Nokia phone! Eat snake kibble to grow long.
list.title: Snake Game

list.description: A place to catalog all the word mountains you've summited and your thoughts about the journey. Rate 'em, log 'em, categorize 'em!
list.title: Under the Shelf
